title: Civilians, businesses, universities potential targets: US embassy in Baghdad warns of attacks
summary_full: The US Embassy in Baghdad has issued a stark warning, advising American citizens to depart Iraq immediately due to credible threats of attacks by Iran-aligned militias within the next 48 hours. These groups, known for targeting Americans, may even impersonate government officials. This alert escalates regional tensions, impacting Iraq's vital oil exports and economy.
